implementation_summary: Three targeted edits to story-planner.md (Rule 4 uniqueness wording, Mode 3 category-field note, Validation Checks schema-conformance bullet), two pattern replacements in stories.schema.json (story.id and story_order item from ^[0-9]{2}$ to ^S[0-9]+$), and creation of verification.schema.json as a JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 contract for verification.json question records.

tests.note: No automated test suite; all 7 ACs verified via shell commands per acceptance-criteria.md

ac_results.AC-STRUCT-1: PASS — 'within the AC file' absent; 'within its tag' at line 161
ac_results.AC-STRUCT-3: PASS — grep -Fc '"^S[0-9]+$"' returns 2 (>=2 required); legacy pattern count 0
ac_results.AC-STRUCT-4: PASS — 'not.*"type"' at line 127, Mode 3 heading at line 82
ac_results.AC-STRUCT-5: PASS — 'stories.schema.json' at line 199, Validation Checks at line 187
